title: Auto-provision workspace member packages on publish

source.subject: fix(pckg): auto-provision workspace member packages on publish

body:
## Outcome

Auto-provision workspace member packages on publish.

## Context

- Workstream **pckg-registry** — registry and PackageDocs UI.
- Contributes to deliverable **api.json primary contract** (`v02-api-json-contract`).
- LSP work shares the typed HIR spine with analyze/build; workspace templates feed the project graph pipeline.

## Provenance

- **Repository:** `pckg`
- **Commit:** [`09542b2`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/pckg/commit/09542b2) — fix(pckg): auto-provision workspace member packages on publish
